markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Yordan Alvarez records 4+ hits in the Detroit vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 16, 2026 at 8:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Yordan Alvarez is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Yordan Alvarez starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Yordan Alvarez is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Yordan Alvarez is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
